description: Manual testnet/staging smoke for configured RPC, GraphQL, and app URLs; requires explicit opt-in to avoid accidental real-environment probes.

data.guardPolicy: Requires COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ENABLE_TESTNET_SMOKE=1 plus COMMONALITY_TESTNET_RPC_URL, COMMONALITY_TESTNET_GRAPHQL_URL, and COMMONALITY_TESTNET_APP_URL before probing staging/testnet endpoints.
